regional_cost_note: Builders in Hastings typically charge $80–$100/hr for labour. New build costs range $2,600–$3,800/m², generally 10–15% below Auckland rates. Strong demand from the horticultural sector supports commercial and light-industrial construction alongside residential. Always verify your builder's LBP licence at lbp.govt.nz.

businesses.name: RHL Build & Construct
businesses.known_for: Highly rated for affordable, efficient residential builds and renovations; covers new homes, fencing, earthworks, and roofing across Hawke's Bay with 20+ years combined experience.

businesses.name: Advance Trade Solutions
businesses.known_for: Multi-trade outfit handling carpentry, plumbing, painting, electrical, and carpet laying in Hastings; over 100 completed jobs with a sister company for electrical and heat pump work.

businesses.name: Cathro Construction
businesses.known_for: Sole-trader builder with 10 years of residential experience covering foundations, roofing, fencing, sheds, and general construction repairs across Hastings and Napier.
